# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _
import groovy.transform.Field

@Field
def ALLOWED_ARTIFACT_DOMAINS = [
    's3.amazonaws.com',
    's3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com',
    's3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com',
    'artifactory.company.internal',
    'artifacts.company.internal',
    'nexus.company.internal'
]

@Field
def ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS = ['https']

@Field
def MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE_MB = 500

@Field
def DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT_MINUTES = 30

properties([
    parameters([
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL of the artifact to deploy (must be from approved sources)',
            trim: true
        ),
        choice(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SHA256 checksum of the artifact for verification',
            trim: true
        ),
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_HEALTH_CHECK',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip post-deployment health checks (not recommended for production)'
        )
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'secure-deployment-agent'
    }
    
    options {
        timeout(time: DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT_MINUTES, unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        skipDefaultCheckout()
    }
    
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOYMENT_LOG = "${WORKSPACE}/deployment.log"
        CREDENTIAL_ID = credentials('deployment-credentials')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Validating deployment parameters..."
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM || params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.length() != 64) {
                        error("Valid SHA256 ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM is required (64 hex characters)")
                    }
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production' && params.SKIP_HEALTH_CHECK) {
                        error("Health checks cannot be skipped in production environment")
                    }
                    
                    validateArtifactURL(params.ARTIFACT_URL)
                    
                    echo "Parameter validation successful"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Security Approval') {
            when {
                expression { params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Production deployment requires approval..."
                    
                    def deploymentInfo = """
                    Artifact URL: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                    Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
                    Checksum: ${params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM}
                    Requested by: ${currentBuild.getBuildCauses()[0].userId ?: 'automated'}
                    """.stripIndent()
                    
                    timeout(time: 15, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        input(
                            message: "Approve production deployment?",
                            submitter: 'deployment-approvers',
                            parameters: [
                                text(
                                    name: 'APPROVAL_NOTES',
                                    defaultValue: '',
                                    description: 'Approval notes'
                                )
                            ]
                        )
                    }
                    
                    echo "Deployment approved for production"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Preparing deployment environment..."
                    
                    sh """
                        rm -rf '${ARTIFACT_DIR}'
                        mkdir -p '${ARTIFACT_DIR}'
                        chmod 700 '${ARTIFACT_DIR}'
                    """
                    
                    echo "Environment prepared"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Downloading artifact from approved source..."
                    
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact.tar.gz"
                    def sanitizedUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9:/.\\-_]', '')
                    
                    timeout(time: 10, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        def downloadStatus = sh(
                            script: """
                                set -e
                                curl --fail --silent --show-error --location \
                                     --max-filesize ${MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE_MB * 1024 * 1024} \
                                     --max-time 600 \
                                     --retry 3 \
                                     --retry-delay 5 \
                                     --output '${artifactFile}' \
                                     '${sanitizedUrl}'
                                
                                if [ ! -f '${artifactFile}' ]; then
                                    echo "Download failed: artifact file not created"
                                    exit 1
                                fi
                                
                                FILE_SIZE=\$(stat -f%z '${artifactFile}' 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s '${artifactFile}')
                                if [ \$FILE_SIZE -eq 0 ]; then
                                    echo "Download failed: artifact file is empty"
                                    exit 1
                                fi
                                
                                echo "Downloaded \$FILE_SIZE bytes"
                            """,
                            returnStatus: true
                        )
                        
                        if (downloadStatus != 0) {
                            error("Failed to download artifact from ${sanitizedUrl}")
                        }
                    }
                    
                    echo "Artifact downloaded successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Artifact Integrity') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Verifying artifact checksum..."
                    
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact.tar.gz"
                    def expectedChecksum = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.toLowerCase()
                    
                    def actualChecksum = sh(
                        script: "shasum -a 256 '${artifactFile}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().toLowerCase()
                    
                    if (actualChecksum != expectedChecksum) {
                        error("Checksum verification failed!\nExpected: ${expectedChecksum}\nActual: ${actualChecksum}")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Checksum verification successful: ${actualChecksum}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Scan Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Scanning artifact for security vulnerabilities..."
                    
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact.tar.gz"
                    
                    sh """
                        set -e
                        
                        echo "Checking file type..."
                        file '${artifactFile}' | grep -q 'gzip compressed data' || {
                            echo "Invalid file type detected"
                            exit 1
                        }
                        
                        echo "Extracting for scanning..."
                        mkdir -p '${ARTIFACT_DIR}/extracted'
                        tar -xzf '${artifactFile}' -C '${ARTIFACT_DIR}/extracted' --no-same-owner --no-same-permissions
                        
                        echo "Scanning for malicious patterns..."
                        find '${ARTIFACT_DIR}/extracted' -type f -name '*.sh' -o -name '*.py' | while read file; do
                            if grep -qE '(eval|exec|system)\\s*\\(' "\$file" 2>/dev/null; then
                                echo "Warning: Potentially dangerous code found in \$file"
                            fi
                        done
                        
                        echo "Basic security scan completed"
                    """
                    
                    echo "Artifact scan completed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Deploying artifact to ${params.ENVIRONMENT} servers..."
                    
                    def servers = getDeploymentServers(params.ENVIRONMENT)
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact.tar.gz"
                    
                    def deploymentResults = [:]
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        try {
                            echo "Deploying to server: ${server}"
                            
                            withCredentials([
                                sshUserPrivateKey(
                                    credentialsId: "ssh-key-${params.ENVIRONMENT}",
                                    keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
                                    usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER'
                                )
                            ]) {
                                sh """
                                    set -e
                                    
                                    SSH_OPTS="-o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/jenkins_home/.ssh/known_hosts -i \${SSH_KEY}"
                                    
                                    echo "Copying artifact to ${server}..."
                                    scp \${SSH_OPTS} '${artifactFile}' "\${SSH_USER}@${server}:/tmp/artifact.tar.gz"
                                    
                                    echo "Executing deployment script on ${server}..."
                                    ssh \${SSH_OPTS} "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" 'bash -s' << 'ENDSSH'
                                        set -e
                                        
                                        DEPLOY_DIR="/opt/application"
                                        BACKUP_DIR="/opt/application_backup_\$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
                                        
                                        if [ -d "\${DEPLOY_DIR}" ]; then
                                            echo "Creating backup..."
                                            sudo cp -r "\${DEPLOY_DIR}" "\${BACKUP_DIR}"
                                        fi
                                        
                                        echo "Extracting artifact..."
                                        sudo mkdir -p "\${DEPLOY_DIR}"
                                        sudo tar -xzf /tmp/artifact.tar.gz -C "\${DEPLOY_DIR}" --no-same-owner
                                        
                                        echo "Setting permissions..."
                                        sudo chown -R appuser:appgroup "\${DEPLOY_DIR}"
                                        sudo chmod -R 755 "\${DEPLOY_DIR}"
                                        
                                        echo "Restarting application..."
                                        sudo systemctl restart application
                                        
                                        echo "Cleaning up..."
                                        rm -f /tmp/artifact.tar.gz
                                        
                                        echo "Deployment completed on ${server}"
ENDSSH
                                """
                            }
                            
                            deploymentResults[server] = 'SUCCESS'
                            echo "Deployment to ${server} completed successfully"
                            
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            deploymentResults[server] = 'FAILED'
                            echo "Deployment to ${server} failed: ${e.message}"
                            
                            if (params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production') {
                                error("Production deployment failed on ${server}")
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    def failedServers = deploymentResults.findAll { k, v -> v == 'FAILED' }
                    if (failedServers) {
                        error("Deployment failed on servers: ${failedServers.keySet().join(', ')}")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Deployment completed on all servers"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Health Check') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_HEALTH_CHECK }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Performing post-deployment health checks..."
                    
                    def servers = getDeploymentServers(params.ENVIRONMENT)
                    
                    sleep(time: 30, unit: 'SECONDS')
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        retry(3) {
                            def healthStatus = sh(
                                script: "curl --fail --silent --max-time 10 https://${server}/health",
                                returnStatus: true
                            )
                            
                            if (healthStatus != 0) {
                                error("Health check failed for ${server}")
                            }
                            
                            echo "Health check passed for ${server}"
                        }
                    }
                    
                    echo "All health checks passed"
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "Deployment completed successfully"
                
                def message = """
                Deployment Successful
                Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
                Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                Checksum: ${params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM}
                Build: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                """.stripIndent()
                
                notifyDeployment('SUCCESS', message)
            }
        }
        
        failure {
            script {
                echo "Deployment failed"
                
                def message = """
                Deployment Failed
                Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
                Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                Build: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                """.stripIndent()
                
                notifyDeployment('FAILURE', message)
            }
        }
        
        always {
            script {
                echo "Cleaning up workspace..."
                
                sh """
                    rm -rf '${ARTIFACT_DIR}'
                    rm -f '${DEPLOYMENT_LOG}'
                """
                
                cleanWs()
            }
        }
    }
}

def validateArtifactURL(String url) {
    if (!url || url.trim().isEmpty()) {
        error("Artifact URL cannot be empty")
    }
    
    try {
        def uri = new URI(url)
        
        def protocol = uri.getScheme()
        if (!protocol || !ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS.contains(protocol.toLowerCase())) {
            error("Invalid protocol '${protocol}'. Only ${ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS.join(', ')} are allowed")
        }
        
        def host = uri.getHost()
        if (!host) {
            error("Invalid URL: missing host")
        }
        
        def isAllowed = ALLOWED_ARTIFACT_DOMAINS.any { allowedDomain ->
            host.equals(allowedDomain) || host.endsWith(".${allowedDomain}")
        }
        
        if (!isAllowed) {
            error("Host '${host}' is not in the list of allowed artifact sources. Allowed domains: ${ALLOWED_ARTIFACT_DOMAINS.join(', ')}")
        }
        
        if (url.contains('..') || url.contains('//')) {
            error("URL contains potentially malicious path traversal patterns")
        }
        
        if (url =~ /[<>\"'`]/) {
            error("URL contains invalid characters")
        }
        
        echo "URL validation passed for: ${host}"
        
    } catch (URISyntaxException e) {
        error("Invalid URL format: ${e.message}")
    }
}

def getDeploymentServers(String environment) {
    def servers = [:]
    servers['staging'] = ['staging-app-01.company.internal', 'staging-app-02.company.internal']
    servers['production'] = ['prod-app-01.company.internal', 'prod-app-02.company.internal', 'prod-app-03.company.internal']
    
    return servers[environment] ?: []
}

def notifyDeployment(String status, String message) {
    try {
        emailext(
            subject: "Deployment ${status}: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}",
            body: message,
            to: 'deployments@company.internal',
            mimeType: 'text/plain'
        )
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Failed to send notification: ${e.message}"
    }
}
